Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 216 

PTNT_DSCHRG_STUS_CD 

LABEL: Patient Status at Ending Date of Service 

DESCRIPTION: A code indicating the Patients status as of the claim line Ending Date of Service (variable in the line file 
called LINE_SRVC_END_DT). 

SHORT NAME: PTNT_DSCHRG_STUS_CD 

LONG NAME: PTNT_DSCHRG_STUS_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT
